definition: (collective) A group of fish or a group of marine mammals such as porpoises, dolphins, or whales.
example: The divers encountered a huge school of mackerel.
exampleVi: Các thợ lặn gặp phải một đàn cá thu khổng lồ.

definition: A group, collection, category or set sharing characteristics or attributes.
example: Often used to imply membership of a large class.
exampleVi: Thường được sử dụng để ám chỉ thành viên của một lớp lớn.

definition: A room, often in a school, where classes take place
example: We need to understand the concept of classroom.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm lớp học.

definition: A person who teaches, especially one employed in a school.
example: We need to understand the concept of teacher.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm người thầy.

definition: A person who studies or learns about a particular subject.
example: He is a student of life.
exampleVi: Anh ấy là một sinh viên của cuộc sống.

definition: A learner under the supervision of a teacher or professor.
example: We need to understand the concept of pupil.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm học sinh.

definition: A section of learning or teaching into which a wider learning content is divided.
example: In our school a typical working week consists of around twenty lessons and ten hours of related laboratory work.
exampleVi: Ở trường chúng tôi, một tuần làm việc điển hình bao gồm khoảng 20 giờ học và 10 giờ làm việc trong phòng thí nghiệm liên quan.

definition: Likely to be affected by or to experience something.
example: He's subject to sneezing fits.
exampleVi: Anh ấy hay bị hắt hơi.

definition: A collection of sheets of paper bound together to hinge at one edge, containing printed or written material, pictures, etc.
example: He was frustrated because he couldn't find anything about dinosaurs in the book.
exampleVi: Anh ấy thất vọng vì không thể tìm thấy bất cứ điều gì về khủng long trong cuốn sách.

definition: A book in which notes or memoranda are written.
example: We need to understand the concept of notebook.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm sổ ghi chép.

definition: An enclosure (enclosed area) used to contain domesticated animals, especially sheep or cattle.
example: There are two steers in the third pen.
exampleVi: Có hai con bò ở chuồng thứ ba.

definition: A paintbrush.
example: We need to understand the concept of pencil.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về bút chì.

definition: The act of examining.
example: We need to understand the concept of exam.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm bài kiểm tra.

definition: A challenge, trial.
example: We need to understand the concept of test.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm kiểm tra.

definition: A rating.
example: I gave him a good grade for effort.
exampleVi: Tôi đã cho anh ấy điểm cao về nỗ lực.

definition: The total number of goals, points, runs, etc. earned by a participant in a game.
example: The player with the highest score is the winner.
exampleVi: Người chơi có số điểm cao nhất là người chiến thắng.

definition: To change place.
example: We need to understand the concept of pass.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về pass.

definition: Poor quality; substandard workmanship.
example: The project was full of fail.
exampleVi: Dự án đầy thất bại.

definition: The act of learning something
example: We need to understand the concept of learn.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm học tập.

definition: (usually academic) To review materials already learned in order to make sure one does not forget them, usually in preparation for an examination.
example: I need to study my biology notes.
exampleVi: Tôi cần nghiên cứu các ghi chú sinh học của mình.

definition: A corporate group; a group of colleagues.
example: We need to understand the concept of college.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm đại học.

definition: Institution of higher education (typically accepting students from the age of about 17 or 18, depending on country, but in some exceptional cases able to take younger students) where subjects are studied and researched in depth and degrees are offered.
example: The only reason why I haven't gone to university is because I can't afford it.
exampleVi: Lý do duy nhất khiến tôi không học đại học là vì tôi không đủ khả năng chi trả.

definition: a word related to this topic
example: This is an example sentence using the word degree.
exampleVi: Đây là một câu ví dụ sử dụng từ độ.

definition: A document issued by an educational institution testifying that the recipient has earned a degree or has successfully completed a particular course of study.
example: We need to understand the concept of diploma.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm bằng tốt nghiệp.

definition: a word related to this topic
example: This is an example sentence using the word course.
exampleVi: Đây là một câu ví dụ sử dụng từ khóa học.

definition: a word related to this topic
example: This is an example sentence using the word lecture.
exampleVi: Đây là một câu ví dụ sử dụng từ bài giảng.

definition: The most senior rank for an academic at a university or similar institution, informally also known as "full professor." Abbreviated Prof.
example: We need to understand the concept of professor.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm giáo sư.

definition: a word related to this topic
example: This is an example sentence using the word semester.
exampleVi: Đây là một câu ví dụ sử dụng từ học kỳ.

definition: a word related to this topic
example: This is an example sentence using the word tuition.

definition: a word related to this topic
example: This is an example sentence using the word scholarship.

definition: A company of people that share the same interest or aim.
example: The Fellowship of the Ring
exampleVi: Hiệp hội của chiếc nhẫn

definition: The academic staff at schools, colleges, universities or not-for-profit research institutes, as opposed to the students or support staff.
example: We need to understand the concept of faculty.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm giảng viên.

definition: The act of enrolling or the state of being enrolled.
example: We need to understand the concept of enrollment.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm tuyển sinh.

definition: (usually capitalized) The garden where Plato taught.
example: We need to understand the concept of academy.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm học viện.

definition: The act or practice of admitting.
example: We need to understand the concept of admission.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm nhập học.

definition: The act of granting; a bestowing or conferring; concession; allowance; permission.
example: We need to understand the concept of grant.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm trợ cấp.

definition: A custom or practice of a society or community.
example: We need to understand the concept of institution.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm tổ chức.

definition: A person who is recognized by a university as having completed the requirements of a degree studied at the institution.
example: If the government wants graduates to stay in the country they should offer more incentives.
exampleVi: Nếu chính phủ muốn sinh viên tốt nghiệp ở lại trong nước thì họ nên đưa ra nhiều ưu đãi hơn.

definition: One who administers affairs; one who directs, manages, executes, or dispenses, whether in civil, judicial, political, or ecclesiastical affairs; a manager
example: We need to understand the concept of administrator.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm người quản trị.

definition: A student at a university who has not yet received a degree.
example: We need to understand the concept of undergraduate.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm đại học.

definition: A document containing a certified statement.
example: We need to understand the concept of certificate.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm chứng chỉ.

definition: A summary of topics which will be covered during an academic course, or a text or lecture.
example: We need to understand the concept of syllabus.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm giáo trình.

definition: The set of courses, coursework, and their content, offered at a school or university.
example: We need to understand the concept of curriculum.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm chương trình giảng dạy.

definition: A female pupil or student (especially of a university or college).
example: We need to understand the concept of alumna.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm cựu sinh viên.

definition: A particular discipline or branch of learning, especially one dealing with measurable or systematic principles rather than intuition or natural ability.
example: Of course in my opinion Social Studies is more of a science than an art.
exampleVi: Tất nhiên theo quan điểm của tôi Khoa học xã hội thiên về khoa học hơn là nghệ thuật.

definition: A person who is below the age of majority, consent, criminal responsibility or other adult responsibilities and accountabilities.
example: It is illegal to sell weapons to minors under the age of eighteen.
exampleVi: Việc bán vũ khí cho trẻ vị thành niên dưới mười tám tuổi là bất hợp pháp.

definition: A controlled behaviour; self-control.
example: We need to understand the concept of discipline.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm kỷ luật.

definition: A conference or other meeting for discussion of a topic, especially one in which the participants make presentations.
example: We need to understand the concept of symposium.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm hội nghị chuyên đề.

definition: Something which has been transcribed; a writing or composition consisting of the same words as the original; a written copy.
example: We need to understand the concept of transcript.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm bản ghi.

definition: The study of Ancient Greek and Latin, their literature, history, etc., sometimes inclusive of the study of the ancient Mediterranean generally.
example: We need to understand the concept of humanities.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm nhân văn.

definition: An official keeper or recorder of records.
example: We need to understand the concept of registrar.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm nhà đăng ký.

definition: A military rank between captain and lieutenant colonel.
example: He used to be a major in the army.
exampleVi: Ông từng là thiếu tá trong quân đội.

definition: A colloquy; a meeting for discussion.
example: We need to understand the concept of colloquium.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm hội thảo.

definition: One who audits bookkeeping accounts.
example: We need to understand the concept of auditor.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm kiểm toán viên.

definition: A colleague or partner.
example: We need to understand the concept of fellow.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm đồng loại.

definition: An individual alumnus or alumna.
example: We need to understand the concept of alumni.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm cựu sinh viên.

definition: The profession of teaching.
example: We need to understand the concept of pedagogy.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm sư phạm.

definition: A student; one who studies at school or college, typically having a scholarship.
example: We need to understand the concept of scholar.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm học giả.

definition: A senior secretary or official with administrative or legal duties, sometimes in charge of some area of government such as finance or justice.
example: Chancellor of the Duchy of Lancaster  Lord Chancellor
exampleVi: Thủ tướng của Công quốc Lancaster  Thủ tướng

definition: Enrollment in a college or university
example: We need to understand the concept of matriculation.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm trúng tuyển.

definition: A status of possessing a thing or an office; an incumbency.
example: We need to understand the concept of tenure.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về quyền sở hữu.

definition: A senior official in a college or university, who may be in charge of a division or faculty (for example, the dean of science) or have some other advisory or disciplinary function (for example, the dean of students).
example: We need to understand the concept of dean.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm trưởng khoa.

definition: The action or process of graduating and receiving a diploma for completing a course of study (such as from an educational institution).
example: We need to understand the concept of graduation.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm tốt nghiệp.

definition: A teacher or lecturer at some universities (in central Europe, etc.)
example: We need to understand the concept of docent.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm docent.

definition: An extended period of leave from a person's usual pursuits.
example: We need to understand the concept of sabbatical.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm ngày nghỉ phép.

definition: One placed in charge: a head, a chief, particularly:
example: We need to understand the concept of provost.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về Provost.

definition: A bachelor's degree.
example: We need to understand the concept of baccalaureate.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm tú tài.

definition: A member (especially a senior one) of the faculty at a college or university; an academic.
example: We need to understand the concept of academician.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm học giả.
